title: Magical Croatian Hazelnut Pasta
description: A creamy and indulgent lacto-vegetarian Croatian dish featuring hazelnuts and a hint of citrus, made with a tadka for added flavor.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the fettuccine pasta according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat and add the chopped hazelnuts, cooking until fragrant.
Add the tadka spice blend to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the heavy cream to the skillet and bring to a simmer, cooking until slightly reduced.
Stir in the grated parmesan cheese until melted and smooth.
Add the cooked fettuccine pasta to the skillet, tossing to combine with the cream sauce.
Season with salt, black pepper, and lemon zest.
Serve hot, garnished with additional hazelnuts and parmesan cheese if desired.
Melt the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter and toss with the pasta for added richness.
